error.signature: Stripe webhook payload format changed — API version not pinned

verdict.summary: Stripe dashboard API version upgrade changes webhook payload format silently.

dead_ends.action: Always use the latest API version without pinning
dead_ends.why_fails: Unpinned version auto-upgrades when Stripe updates; webhook format changes break handlers

dead_ends.action: Only pin version in code but not in webhook endpoint settings
dead_ends.why_fails: Webhook events use the endpoint API version, not the code version

workarounds.action: Pin API version in both SDK and webhook endpoint configuration
workarounds.how: stripe.api_version = '2023-10-16'  # also pin in Dashboard > Webhooks

workarounds.action: Test webhook payloads with Stripe CLI before upgrading
